# Third-Party References

This directory is reserved for optional reference clones and licenses.

Recommended layout:

- `third_party/VideoPose3D/`
- `third_party/mediapipe/`

These repositories are external work and should remain clearly separated from the custom implementation in `src/bmpose/`.

The helper script at `scripts/clone_references.ps1` clones them into this folder with their original history and licenses.
